system.description: Unleash a telekinetic blast at a target, knocking them prone and dealing damage. Can be sustained or widened at higher tiers.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Trap a target in a telekinetic vortex, holding them immobile and dealing repeated damage over several seconds.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Release a devastating explosion of telekinetic force, hurling all nearby enemies away and dealing heavy damage across a wide area.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Subtly influence a weak-minded individual through the Force, opening unique dialogue options and allowing you to pass through areas unopposed. Does not affect droids.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Command the minds of even strong-willed beings, leaving very few individuals able to resist your influence. Does not affect droids.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Hurl your lightsaber at a distant target dealing energy damage. The attack strikes unerringly and the saber returns to your hand.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Hurl your lightsaber in a sweeping arc, striking up to three targets in sequence before returning to your hand.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Channel the Force through your body, dramatically increasing movement speed and reaction time. Armor-restricted.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: An enhanced Burst of Speed that also grants an additional attack each round from heightened reflexes. Armor-restricted.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Cancel active Force powers on a target, stripping protective buffs and leaving them vulnerable. Armor-restricted.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: A more potent Force Suppression capable of dismantling even the strongest Force protections. Armor-restricted.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Freeze an enemy in place with the Force. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure reduces the effect to slowing. Does not affect droids. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Paralyze an enemy completely. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure still leaves the target slowed. Does not affect droids. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Project a paralyzing Force wave that immobilizes all enemies in a wide area. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Channel the Force to heal wounds for all nearby allies. Does not affect droids. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: A more powerful restoration that heals greater wounds and purges poison from all nearby allies. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Suffuse all nearby allies with the Force, temporarily increasing their physical attributes and saving throws. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Enhanced Force Valor providing greater bonuses and conferring immunity to poison. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: The most powerful application of Force Valor, granting exceptional attribute and saving throw bonuses across the entire party. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Surround yourself with a Force barrier that improves your defense and makes it harder for enemies to target you with Force powers. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Custom

system.description: A stronger Force barrier offering enhanced defense and Force protection. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Custom

system.description: The most powerful Force defense, creating near-impenetrable barriers against both physical attacks and Force powers. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Custom

system.description: Sense the flows of combat through the Force, adding your Willpower modifier to your Defense rating. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: Erect a Force shield that absorbs the first points of physical damage from slashing, bludgeoning, and piercing attacks. Armor-restricted. Light Side power — add a Setback if Dark Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: Trigger painful spasms in a target's body, dealing sustained damage over several seconds. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure negates the power. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Seize a target's throat telekinetically, dealing ongoing damage and inflicting temporary penalties to physical attributes. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure negates the power. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Choke the life from an enemy in moments, dealing damage equal to a significant fraction of their total health. A Resilience check reduces the damage. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Unleash a bolt of Force lightning at a single target, dealing electrical damage. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure halves the damage. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Project a cone of electrical Force energy that strikes multiple enemies in front of you. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure halves the damage. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Summon a catastrophic storm of Force lightning that strikes all nearby enemies with massive electrical damage. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Cloud a target's mind, reducing their defense, accuracy, and movement speed for an extended duration. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure negates the effect. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Inflict a Force-induced poison that causes the target's attributes to gradually degrade. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Siphon the life force from an enemy to heal yourself, dealing damage proportional to your power. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure halves the damage. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Drain the life force from all nearby enemies simultaneously, healing yourself for the total damage dealt. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Flood an enemy's mind with terror, causing them to cower helplessly. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure negates the effect. Does not affect droids. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Project an overwhelming wave of terror that paralyzes all enemies near the target. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure negates the effect. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Drive all nearby enemies into complete mental collapse. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure negates the effect. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Release a Force-amplified scream dealing sonic damage and reducing the attributes of all enemies in a forward arc. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: A more powerful Force Scream dealing greater sonic damage over a wider area with deeper attribute penalties. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: The ultimate Force Scream, dealing massive sonic damage and dramatically reducing the attributes of all enemies in range. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: Channel dark side rage, dramatically increasing your Strength and Vitality while reducing your Defense. Killed enemies fuel the Fury further. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: Enhanced Force Fury that sustains the rage longer and grants an additional attack per round from heightened aggression. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: The pinnacle of Force Fury, granting exceptional combat bonuses and two additional attacks for an extended duration. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: Telekinetically crush an enemy with the full weight of the Force, dealing massive damage that bypasses most defenses. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure halves the damage. Armor-restricted. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II

system.description: Intensive lightsaber training grants +1 rank in the Lightsabers skill.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: Mastery of lightsaber technique grants an additional +1 rank in the Lightsabers skill, stacking with Weapon Focus.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

system.description: An advanced dual-wielding technique that further reduces the difficulty of combined combat checks when fighting with two lightsabers.
system.source: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic
